title: AVIR

headings.text: Architectural Design with Custom in Mind

If you are interested in scheduling for one of our professional engineers to meet with you or your interior designer for your remodel or new construction project in Palm Desert or rest of the Coachella Valley, we may be reached at:

bodyText: MenuHomeServicesBrandsPortfolioAboutExciting PRoductsContactHome CinemaAutomationLightingShadingMusicSecurityNetworkingSage Series L150mPosted on October 29, 2025Line Source On-Wall LoudspeakerThe L150m is the premier expression of the core technology and strengths of the Sage Series, designed for those customers that demand the highest level of sonic refinement and performance available in an architectural speaker. It combines state-of-the-art planar transducer elements in a way that takes full advantage of their inherent performance benefits. It offers a no-compromise solution for customers that require a high-end audiophile loudspeaker that fully integrates into their home.Architectural Design with Custom in MindSlim and elegant in design, the On-Wall Sage L150m blends nicely into any d√©cor with optional custom lengths and colors available.Eliminate Floor and Ceiling ReflectionThe Line Source design eliminates floor and ceiling reflection while distributing sound levels uniformly across the width of any room.Big Bass in Small BoxesFeaturing Sage Series dynamic woofers that are more than twice as powerful as typical woofers for great bass without huge, ugly boxes that are difficult to place.Power Over DistanceLine Source provides a much better power constituency than a point source. This is a great benefit when designing an entertainment system in large modern open-floor living spaces as well as multi-tier theaters.Line SourceEliminate Floor and Ceiling ReflectionEnhance ClarityMore Power Over DistanceShare ExperienceFlexibilityAvailable as In-Wall L150iIn-Wall / On-WallCan be Mixed and MatchedCustom Colors Available L150mCustom Length Grilles Available L150iCustom Length Available L150mAnodized Trim Bezels L150m‚Äç‚Äç"No better way to showcase the benefits of Line Source than demonstrating a single L150m-AWFS . Listen to the coverage and consistency Line Source provides no matter how wide or far we move (yes, this is not embedded audio, this is the actual audio coming from the speaker in the video).Line Source allows designers to specify less speakers with wider coverage (170¬∞), and this applies to both our Indoor and All Weather versions. Designers can also add stand alone woofer columns to any part of the yard to fill out the low frequency if needed. Wisdom in the great outdoors is now available!"‚ÄçInstagram link to video‚Äç‚Äç‚ÄçIf you are interested in scheduling for one of our professional engineers to meet with you or your interior designer for your remodel or new construction project in Palm Desert or rest of the Coachella Valley, we may be reached at:Phone: (760) 799-0881Email: Sales@AVIR.comAsk for Charley or Yasin.‚Äç‚Äç‚ÄçServices:Home CinemaAutomationLightingShadingMusicSecurityNetworking‚ÄçProudly serving the entire Coachella Valley and surrounding areas:BanningBeaumontBermuda DunesBig BearCathedral CityCoachellaIdyllwildIndian WellsIndioJoshua TreeLa QuintaLake ArrowheadMoreno ValleyMurrietaPalm DesertPalm SpringsRancho MirageRedlandsRiversideSan BernardinoTemeculaThermalThousand PalmsYucaipaYucca Valley ‚Äç‚Äç‚Äç‚Äç‚Äç‚Äç‚Äç‚ÄçEngage the expertsAVIR operates within the Coachella Valley region, providing exclusive smart automation services for residential and commercial properties.Call760.779.0881Visit our Showroom41905 Boardwalk, Suite XPalm Desert, CA 92211NavigationHomeServicesBrandsExciting ProductsPortfolioAboutCareersContactServicesHome CinemaAutomationLightingShadingMusicSecurityNetworkingExciting ProductsBrowse some of the most exclusive products we can bring to your next technology installation.Find out moreProudly serving the entire Coachella Valley and surrounding areas:BanningBeaumontBermuda DunesBig BearCathedral CityCoachellaIdyllwildIndian WellsIndioJoshua TreeLa QuintaLake ArrowheadMoreno ValleyMurrietaPalm DesertPalm SpringsRancho MirageRedlandsRiversideSan BernardinoTemeculaThermalThousand PalmsYucaipaYucca ValleyCopyright ¬© 2023.
